title: campecia
intro: Campecia, also known as Silybum marianum, is a flowering plant in the daisy family native to the Old World. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly the seeds, which contain silymarin, a flavonoid complex that has anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of campecia include protection against liver damage, improvement of symptoms associated with liver disease, and antioxidant activity that may help prevent cell damage. Campecia seeds can be prepared into herbal supplements, such as capsules or tablets, or used as a tea to support liver health and detoxification.
